document.title: APPROVAL SHEET - AC/DC ADAPTOR BM090S15F02
document.documentType: Approval sheet, specification, test procedure, parts list, drawing, and agency approval sheet

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and technical documentation packet for BridgePower AC/DC adaptor model BM090S15F02.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product specification, production testing, component identification, drawings, and agency approval traceability for the AC/DC adaptor.
keyPoints: The approval sheet identifies ITEM: AC/DC ADAPTOR and MODEL: BM090S15F02.
Specification Rev. A lists rated input AC 100-240V, output +15.5VDC at 5.8A, and safety, electrical, environmental, and mechanical requirements.
The agency approval section includes UL authorization, a UL Manufacturer Report, an EU Declaration of Conformity, and an IECEE CB Test Certificate.

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for AC/DC adaptor model BM090S15F02.
evidence.evidenceText: APPROVAL SHEET; ITEM : AC/DC ADAPTOR; MODEL : BM090S15F02

evidence.claim: The BM090S15F02 revision history records Rev. A as released on 2023.03.09.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision Description PREP. CHKD APPD DATE Rev. A Released H.D Ahn 2023.03.09

evidence.claim: The adaptor rated input is AC 100-240V with voltage range AC 90-264V.
evidence.evidenceText: INPUT * Rated Voltage AC 100 - 240V * Voltage Range AC 90 - 264V

evidence.claim: The adaptor is specified as capable of supplying +15.5VDC at 5.8A.
The specified ripple and noise limit is 155mV p-p maximum.
evidence.evidenceText: Ripple and Noise Less than 1% of rated DC voltage (155mV p-p Max)

evidence.claim: The adaptor includes over-current, over-voltage, short-circuit, and thermal protection features.
evidence.evidenceText: Over Current Protection 130% ~ 180%; Over Voltage Protection 130% ~ 150%; Short circuit Protection Short across the output terminals will not cause damage to the unit; Thermal Protection: Will shutdown upon an overtemperature condition, auto-recovery.

evidence.claim: The specification states EMI complies with EMC Directives and CE is compliant.
evidence.evidenceText: EMI Complies with EMC Directives; CE CE Compliant

evidence.claim: The case dimensions are 153.5(L) x 68.6(W) x 34(H) mm.
UL completed an investigation and authorized application of the UL Mark for the referenced adaptor model family.
evidence.evidenceText: UL's investigation of your product(s) has been completed under the above Reference Number and the product was determined to comply with the applicable requirements. This letter temporarily supplements the UL Follow-Up Services Procedure and serves as authorization to apply the UL Mark

evidence.claim: The UL authorization references File E302267, Vol. D1 and Project Number 4787852439.
evidence.evidenceText: Our Reference: File E302267, Vol. D1 Project Number: 4787852439

evidence.claim: The UL project scope is component recognition to ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1 and CSA CAN/CSA-C22.2 NO. 60601-1:14.
evidence.evidenceText: Project Scope: UL Component Recognition to the following standard(s): ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1:2005/(R)2012 and A1:2012, C1:2009/(R)2012 and A2:2010/(R)2012, CSA CAN/CSA-C22.2 NO. 60601-1:14
evidence.pageTarget: UL Medical Electrical Equipment Component Recognition

evidence.claim: The UL Manufacturer Report number is E302267-D1015-1/A0/C0 and issue date is 2015-12-09.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: E302267‐D1015‐1/A0/C0 Report Issue Date: 2015‐12‐09

evidence.claim: The Declaration of Conformity covers BI090, BM090, TE90 and ME90 series power supplies intended for use with medical units.
evidence.evidenceText: We hereby declare under our sole responsibility that the product model BI090, BM090, TE90 & ME90 series power supply intended for use with medical units
evidence.pageTarget: BI090 BM090 TE90 ME90 Declaration of Conformity

evidence.claim: The Declaration of Conformity lists Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EC, EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, Ecodesign Directive 2009/125/EC, and RoHS II Directive 2011/65/EU.
evidence.evidenceText: Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EC; Electro-Magnetic Compatibility Directive 2014/30/EU; Ecodesign Directive 2009/125/EC; RoHS II Directive 2011/65/EU

evidence.claim: The CB Test Certificate reference number is DK-51428-A1-M1-UL.
The CB Test Certificate identifies the product as AC/DC Adaptor.
The CB Test Certificate was issued on 2017-03-08 with original issue date 2016-01-22.
The CB Test Certificate states the sample conformed to IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-6, including amendments.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of the product was tested and found to be in conformity with IEC 60601-1(ed.3), IEC 60601-1(ed.3);am1, IEC 60601-1-6(ed.3), IEC 60601-1-6(ed.3);am1

reviewFlags.reason: The source combines several document types and dates: a 2023 approval/specification packet, 2015 UL Manufacturer Report, 2017 UL authorization, 2017 Declaration of Conformity, and 2017 CB Test Certificate.
Output rating evidence differs across sections: specification states +15.5VDC at 5.8A, while block diagram and CB certificate model family ratings include 15Vdc at 6.0A.
The agency approval documents cover model families and series designations broader than BM090S15F02.
OCR/text quality contains minor spelling and formatting artifacts, but key regulatory facts remain readable.
